title: Sous Vide Paleo Delight Corn Cakes
description: A paleo twist on traditional corn cakes, made with sous vide cooked corn and a hint of delight.
instructions: Cook corn in sous vide machine for 1 hour.
In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, eggs, delight, salt, and pepper.
Add sous vide cooked corn to the bowl and mix well.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture into a hot skillet greased with cooking spray.
Cook corn cakes for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown, flip and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
